title: Basic Verbs
description: Build a practical starter set of Bulgarian verbs with patterns, examples, and review prompts.

content.title: How Bulgarian Verbs Are Listed
content.description: Dictionary forms often appear in the first person singular, which is a good habit to learn early.

content.title: Key idea
content.text: Bulgarian does not use an infinitive form the way English does. Many verbs are shown as 'аз' forms like 'чета', 'говоря', or 'живея'.

content.title: A simple study method
bullets: Learn the base verb form first.
Add the present-tense ending when you practice conjugation.
Use the verb in a short sentence right away.

content.title: Everyday Actions
content.description: High-frequency verbs you will see constantly in real conversation.

content.title: Communication and Thinking
content.description: Verbs for speaking, hearing, remembering, and understanding.

content.note: A realistic sentence for a learner.

content.title: Movement and Planning
content.description: Useful verbs for getting around and making plans.

content.title: Review and Practice
content.description: Short study blocks for fast recall.

content.question: Which verb means 'to understand'?
content.note: Try to say the full word aloud, not just the translation.
